name: [TEMPLATE] [seo_monitor_plugin] SEO Health Monitor — Firecrawl-diff → change events → alert

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Spend Increment

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_window_start: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), p_channel: "firecrawl", p_sender_id: "firecrawl-daily", p_count: 1, p_spend_usd: (Number($json.__spend_delta) || 0) }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Snapshots

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__current || []).map((e) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, url: e.url, run_date: $json.__run_date, title: e.title, meta_description: e.meta_description, robots: e.robots, canonical: e.canonical, http_status: e.http_status, indexable: e.indexable, raw: e.raw }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Events

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__events || []).map((e) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, url: e.url, event_id: e.event_id, change_class: e.change_class, severity: e.severity, before: e.before, after: e.after, run_date: $json.__run_date, notified: (($json.__max_severity_rank || 0) >= 4) }))) }}
